creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 217969
update to 20200913

Notable changes there:
1. The launch script (bin/steam) now sets the process stack size limit to 8192 Kb, see https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=248225 for the rationale.
2. Core dumps are blocked unless the LSU_COREDUMP environment variable is set to 1.
